title: Yowis Ben Finale
overview: Bayu hurt Cak Jon when he was heartbroken knowing Mbak Rini was going to marry Captain Arjuna. Yowis Ben's fate is at stake. Nando is ready to go to America, and makes Bayu, Doni and Yayan who will soon become fathers of 2 children lose their hopes. When Yowis Ben's family is divided, Bayu is also threatened with breaking up with Asih because of Susan's presence.
